hero.headline: Your Medical Journey to Russia Starts Here
hero.subheadline: With Dr. Saeed Alziyadi, experience world-class medical care at Moscow's finest hospitals — affordable, comprehensive, and fully supported in Arabic

about.title: About Us
about.text: We are an elite team of Arab doctors working in the Russian Ministry of Health under the direct supervision of Dr. Saeed Alziyadi. We offer a comprehensive service that begins with coordinating with the best Russian doctors, through accurate medical translation, accommodation and transport, all the way to post-treatment follow-up.

specialties.title: Our Medical Specialties
specialties.spec1Desc: LASIK surgery, vision correction, and intraocular lens implantation
specialties.spec2Desc: Joint replacement and spinal injury treatment
specialties.spec3Desc: Cardiac catheterization, open-heart surgery, and valve replacement
specialties.spec5Desc: Brain and spinal surgery and neurological disease treatment
specialties.spec6Desc: Specialized programs for rehabilitation after strokes and surgeries, plus prosthetic limbs

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyUs.row1Desc: More than 10 years facilitating medical journeys for Arab patients to Russia with a proven track record of success
whyUs.row2Desc: Established partnerships with the finest hospitals and medical centers in Moscow and St. Petersburg, and relationships with colleague doctors in hospitals that facilitate communicating cases medically and professionally and accelerating admission procedures
whyUs.row3Desc: A dedicated Arabic-speaking team accompanies you at every step of your medical journey
whyUs.row4Desc: Clear and transparent pricing with no hidden costs, with installment options available depending on the case

partners.title: Our Hospital Partners
partners.subtitle: We collaborate with the leading hospitals and medical centers in Russia

tourism.title: Medical Tourism Services

tourism.card3Desc: Private transfer service to and from the airport, hospitals, and all your appointments

faq.q: How do I start my medical journey to Russia?
faq.a: Start by contacting us via WhatsApp or email and sending us your medical file. Our team will review your case, coordinate with the appropriate doctors in Russia, and provide you with a personalized treatment plan.

faq.q: What are the costs of a medical trip to Russia?
faq.a: Costs vary depending on the type of treatment, chosen hospital, and length of stay. In general, treatment costs in Russia are 40-60% lower than in Western countries with the same or better quality. We provide a detailed cost estimate before travel.

faq.q: Do I need a medical visa to enter Russia?
faq.a: All Gulf countries and Jordan do not need an entry visa. Other countries may need a facilitated entry visa such as Algeria, Morocco, and Tunisia. For the remaining countries, an entry visa is required and we help patients obtain it easily.

faq.q: Is medical translation available throughout treatment?
faq.a: Yes, a specialized medical interpreter accompanies you at all your appointments and treatment stages. Our team speaks Arabic, Russian, and English to ensure effective communication with the Russian medical team.

faq.q: What medical specialties are available in Russia?
faq.a: Russia excels in ophthalmology, orthopedic surgery, cardiology, oncology treatment, neurology, and organ transplantation. We have partnerships with the best specialized centers in these fields.

faq.q: How is accommodation and transportation arranged?
faq.a: We take care of arranging your complete stay in comfortable hotels or apartments near the hospital, as well as transportation to and from the airport, between the hospital and your accommodation, and all your medical appointments.

faq.q: What happens if I need more time for treatment or complications arise?
faq.a: We are with you at all times. If an extension of stay or complications arise, our team immediately coordinates with the medical team and arranges what is needed. We also provide 24/7 emergency support.

faq.q: How is follow-up handled after returning home?
faq.a: We provide comprehensive post-return follow-up including: translation of medical reports, coordination with your local doctor, regular video consultations, and emergency support. Our goal is for your medical care to continue after you return.
